gaps.title: Compiler: trait combo voronoi_fracture+granular_material+global_illumination+fluid_simulation triggers HSP001 (A-009 stress-test)
gaps.description: Stress-test scene examples/stress-tests/crystal-cavern-collapse-2026-04-27.holo composed @voronoi_fracture + @granular_material + @global_illumination + @fluid_simulation. Parser emits HSP001: Unknown directive for all four despite each having a *Trait.ts handler — and voronoi_fracture/granular_material are even in trait-registry.json. Root cause: parser maintains a third internal whitelist disjoint from both registry and handler files. Minimal repro: any .holo using @voronoi_fracture. Bug doc: docs/bugs/2026-04-27-stress-test-voronoi-granular-gi-fluid.md
